PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Huster for Peteris Dajevskis.

The Court confirmed that Mr. Huster had no additional authority to cite and stated that the lost will will be admitted to probate. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
